pi_items.source: Chicago Data Portal official dataset (cauq-8yn6) and Wikipedia Community areas of Chicago - Chicago is officially divided into 77 community areas

pi_items.verified_value: HIFLD (Homeland Infrastructure Foundation-Level Data) hospitals dataset from ArcGIS Open Data
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed HIFLD dataset exists at hifld-geoplatform.opendata.arcgis.com and contains hospital locations with point geometries

pi_items.verified_value: Chicago Data Portal dataset ID: cauq-8yn6 (Boundaries - Community Areas current)

pi_items.metadata_value: 2020 ACS 5-year estimates from US Census Bureau / CMAP
pi_items.verified_value: ACS 5-year estimates available from CMAP Community Data Snapshots and Chicago Data Portal
pi_items.source: CMAP publishes Community Data Snapshots for all 77 Chicago community areas; ACS 5-year data by community area available at Chicago Data Portal

pi_items.verified_value: EPSG:26916 (NAD83 / UTM zone 16N) and EPSG:3435 (Illinois East State Plane) are both valid
pi_items.source: EPSG.io and spatial reference sources confirm both are appropriate projected CRS for Chicago
Task description specifies these three fields with clear definitions and classification rules

pi_items.metadata_value: high if hosp_count_5km >= 3, medium if 1-2, low if 0
pi_items.verified_value: high if hosp_count_5km >= 3, medium if hosp_count_5km 1-2, low if hosp_count_5km == 0
pi_items.source: Task description clearly specifies the classification rules

pi_items.metadata_value: straight-line distance from community area centroid to nearest hospital in meters (projected CRS)
pi_items.verified_value: Haversine formula for geographic distances, must be converted to projected CRS for accurate metric measurements
pi_items.source: Task specifies 'projected CRS such as EPSG:26916 or EPSG:3435 for accurate distance computation' and 'All distance calculations must be in projected coordinates (meters), not geographic degrees'
2020 US Census official data confirms Chicago's population as 2,746,388

pi_items.metadata_value: Sum of 77 community area population estimates
pi_items.source: Calculated sum of pop_data dictionary in setup_task.sh - represents ACS 5-year estimates which may differ from decennial Census by ~0.8%

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real, publicly available data: Chicago's 77 official community areas from the Chicago Data Portal (dataset ID cauq-8yn6) and HIFLD hospital locations from ArcGIS Open Data. Population data from 2020 ACS 5-year estimates are embedded in the setup script. Distance calculations require projected coordinate systems (EPSG:26916 UTM or EPSG:3435 Illinois State Plane), not geographic coordinates. The task implements a three-tier access classification based on hospital counts within 5 km of each community centroid.
